message.content:
@startuml
left to right direction
actor Administrator
participant "SpecifyNewVaccineUI" as UI
participant "SpecifyNewVaccineController" as Controller
participant "Company" as Company
participant "VaccineStore" as Store
participant "VaccineTypeStore" as TypeStore
participant "VaccineType" as Type
participant "vc_Vaccine" as VC
participant "admPro_AdministrationProcess" as AdminProcess

' Main flow
Administrator -> UI: 1 starts specifying a new vaccine and its administration process
UI -> Controller: 2 create(Vaccine)
Controller -> Company: 3 typeList = get(VaccineTypeList)
Company -> TypeStore: 4 get(VaccineTypeList)
TypeStore --> Company: 4 get(VaccineTypeList)

UI -> Administrator: 6 request data (name, manufacturer, type, age groups,doses,plasing interval, dosage) and show VaccineType list
Administrator -> UI: 7 types requested data

Controller -> Company: 8 create(VaccineId,name,manufacturer,type,administrationProcess)
Company -> Controller: 9 create(VaccineId,name,manufacturer,type,administrationProcess)
Controller -> Store: 10 create(VaccineId,name,manufacturer,type,administrationProcess)
Store -> VC: 11 vc = create(VaccineId,name,manufacturer,type,administrationProcess)

loop For all age groups
  AdminProcess -> VC: 12 administrationProcess(minAge,maxAge,maxNumberOfDoses,dosage,timeElapsed)
  VC -> AdminProcess: 13 validate(Vaccine)
end

Store -> VC: 14 update(VaccineId)
VC -> Store: 14 update(VaccineId)

UI -> Administrator: 15 shows data and request confirmation
Administrator -> UI: 16 confirms data

Controller -> Store: 17 save(Vaccine)
Store -> Controller: 18 save(Vaccine)
Controller -> Company: 19 save(Vaccine)
Company -> Store: 20 add(VaccineId)
Store -> Company: 20 add(VaccineId)

UI -> Administrator: 21 informs operation (in)success

@enduml
